output_debit_classifier.reason: This transaction represents the delivery of a service that was previously paid for via a customer deposit. When the deposit was originally received, it was recorded as a liability (Unearned Revenue or Customer Deposits). Now that the service has been delivered, we need to recognize the revenue and eliminate the liability. We debit the liability account (Customer Deposits) to decrease it by $100, and credit Revenue (Service Revenue) to recognize the earned income of $100.

output_entry_builder.reason: The customer previously paid a $100 deposit which was recorded as a liability (Customer Deposits/Unearned Revenue). Now that the service has been delivered, we eliminate the liability by debiting Customer Deposits for $100 and recognize the earned revenue by crediting Service Revenue for $100.
